_comment: Cross-references. groups: sets of interchangeable items (ids are MFR|CAT). When one is out of stock, in-stock members show as substitutes. goesWith: accessories that pair with a family of items — 'for' matches like knowledge.json (mfr and/or cat regex). Edit freely; the server hot-reloads.

groups.note: 15A self-test GFCI receptacles, white — interchangeable for most jobs
